name: GoCoding
tagline: Licensed STEM Curriculum for Afterschool Centers
story: GoCoding started inside CODDY International — one of the largest independent coding schools in the world, with 150+ locations across 20+ countries and 8,600+ students.

After years of running our own centers, we packaged the entire curriculum, lesson plans, parent-facing roadmap, and operations playbook into one licensable system. Built specifically for independent afterschool centers that need STEM without the $350K price tag.

We believe the small, owner-operated center is the heart of afterschool education. Our job is to make sure those centers can compete with the big franchises on product — without losing the soul that makes them work.
